items.title: Trump approves nuclear agreement that may allow Saudi Arabia to enrich uranium, AP sources say
items.desc: U.S. President  Donald Trump has approved an agreement with Saudi Arabia that could potentially provide the kingdom with  uranium enrichment capability for its civilian nuclear program, according to two people familiar with the matter.

items.title: See How Houthis Put the Red Sea at Risk as an Alternative Oil Route
items.desc: Saudi Arabia has diverted huge amounts of oil to the Red Sea since the Iran war began, but now the Iranian-backed Houthi militants say that they intend to block that route.

items.title: Church elder and worship leader among dead in fresh wave of attacks in eastern DRC
items.desc: A church elder and a worship leader were among six people killed in an attack on a rural Christian community in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC).

items.title: Cooler inflation hands new UK PM Burnham an early boost
items.desc: Britain's annual inflation rate fell more than expected in June, driven by lower fuel prices, official data showed Wednesday, in a boost to new Prime Minister Andy Burnham.
